prompt: a fluorescence microscopy image showing cellular structure and nuclear details following the reference image.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic fluorescence microscopy image, using image 1 as a precise guide for the irregular shapes and relative positions of two distinct cell bodies and their central nuclei. The upper cell should appear in the top-right of the image, and the lower cell in the bottom-left, both displaying intricate cellular structure and nuclear details characteristic of fluorescence microscopy.
objects: Irregular shapes of cell bodies (as per image 1)
Upper cell in the top-right of the image
Lower cell in the bottom-left of the image
Relative positions of cell bodies and nuclei (as per image 1)
